assertions.title: VAL-STORY-001

steps.action: Read validation contract and mission guidance
steps.expected: Understand required browser-visible behavior and evidence
steps.observed: Completed.

steps.expected: Browser launches and app becomes testable at http://localhost:5173
steps.observed: agent-browser failed before navigation with 'Daemon failed to start (socket: /Users/feuvan/.agent-browser/681429e79854__crossend.sock)'.

steps.expected: Session starts after cleanup/retry
steps.observed: Still blocked after closing stale sessions, installing Chromium, killing stale task daemons, removing stale socket/pid files, and retrying temporary sessions.

evidence.consoleErrors: not available; browser session never launched
evidence.network: curl -sf http://localhost:5173 succeeded; browser automation blocked before page navigation
runtimeChecks: Inspected source for relevant runtime surfaces via ripgrep (difficulty, dungeon, achievement, socket, lore, quest, panel hooks)

assertions.issues: Blocked by browser automation infrastructure; required real user surface could not be exercised.

frictions.description: agent-browser could not start any fresh isolated session; every attempt failed with 'Daemon failed to start (socket: ...)' before the app could be exercised.
frictions.resolution: Tried closing stale sessions, verifying lingering PIDs, killing only the task's stale agent-browser daemons, removing stale socket/pid files, installing Chromium, and retrying with both assigned and temporary session names. Browser automation still could not start.

blockers.description: Required real-user-surface browser validation was blocked because agent-browser could not create the mandated fresh isolated session.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified dev server availability with curl, invoked the agent-browser skill, closed stale sessions, installed Chromium, killed stale agent-browser PIDs for the affected session, removed stale socket/pid files, and retried with multiple session names.

summary: All 37 assigned assertions are blocked for this run because the required isolated browser session could not be started; only mission guidance, contract review, local dev-server healthcheck, and code/runtime surface inspection were completed.
